title: rosa × dumetorum var. thedenii
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. thedenii, also known as the Thedde's wild rose, is a fragrant, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. thedenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. Rosa × dumetorum var. thedenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
